{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Aetheric formula
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Aetheric formula]] on a stone slab allows for rebirth.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
